testcase.name: App / route > shows landing page when unauthenticated
App / route > redirects authenticated user from / to /discover
App / route > renders nothing while auth is loading
App / route > denies /backoffice child pages to non-admin users
App / route > renders /backoffice child pages for admins
isSupportedLocale > accepts en and tr
isSupportedLocale > rejects everything else
resolveLocale > maps tr-TR to tr
resolveLocale > maps en-US to en
resolveLocale > falls back to en for unsupported tags
locale catalogs > en and tr have identical key sets
locale catalogs > en has no empty string values
locale catalogs > tr has no empty string values
AppShell admin entry > exposes skip link, main landmark, and navigation state
AppShell admin entry > shows non-admin header actions as locked when unauthenticated
AppShell admin entry > shows Admin Panel for authenticated admins
AppShell admin entry > hides Admin Panel for regular authenticated users
LanguageSwitcher > switches locale and persists the selection
formatRatingWithCountText > shows the score with a defensive rating count when available
formatRatingWithCountText > keeps the score visible when the backend has not rolled out count yet
formatRatingWithCountText > renders nothing for unrated items
AuthContext > clears a stale session when the current user profile is not found
LocaleContext > defaults to english when nothing is stored
LocaleContext > hydrates locale from localStorage
LocaleContext > persists locale changes to localStorage and i18n state
buildAdminListPath > serializes filters and pagination while skipping empty values
admin mutation services > posts notification payloads with delivery mode
admin mutation services > posts participation create and cancel actions
admin event report services > fetches event reports with filters
apiGetAuth > returns data on a successful response
apiGetAuth > silently refreshes on 401 and retries with the new token
apiGetAuth > calls onRefreshSuccess with new tokens after a successful refresh
apiGetAuth > calls onRefreshFailure and throws when refresh request returns 401
apiGetAuth > throws without attempting refresh when no token manager is set
apiGetAuth > throws when retry after refresh also returns 401
apiGetAuth > deduplicates concurrent refresh calls
apiPostAuth > returns data on success
apiPostAuth > silently refreshes on 401 and retries
apiPostAuth > returns undefined for 204 responses
apiPatchAuth > returns updated data on success
apiPatchAuth > silently refreshes on 401 and retries
searchLocation > returns [] without calling fetch when query is shorter than 2 chars
searchLocation > returns [] for whitespace-only queries
searchLocation > hits the Photon endpoint with the expected query params
searchLocation > does NOT hit the legacy Nominatim endpoint
searchLocation > maps Photon GeoJSON business-flows to LocationSuggestion shape
searchLocation > joins street + housenumber and dedupes repeated locality parts
searchLocation > skips business-flows missing coordinates or display name
searchLocation > returns [] when Photon responds with a non-OK status
searchLocation > returns [] when fetch throws
searchLocation > returns [] when Photon body is malformed JSON
reverseGeocode > returns null for non-finite coordinates
reverseGeocode > hits the Photon reverse endpoint with lat/lon and lang=en
reverseGeocode > maps the first Photon feature to a LocationSuggestion
reverseGeocode > keeps standard reverse geocoded names unless area-level formatting is requested
reverseGeocode > prefers area-level names for map-selection reverse geocoding
reverseGeocode > falls back to original coordinates when the feature lacks geometry
reverseGeocode > keeps the original clicked coordinates when Photon returns a snapped feature
reverseGeocode > returns null when Photon returns no business-flows
reverseGeocode > returns null when fetch throws
reverseGeocode > returns null when Photon responds with a non-OK status
eventService.discoverEvents > passes selected audience filters to discovery requests
eventService.createEventReport > posts an authenticated event report request
eventService.updateEvent > patches event updates through the versioned update endpoint
eventService.listEventApprovedParticipants > passes participant status filters to the backend
eventService.reconfirmEventParticipation > posts to the reconfirm endpoint with bearer auth
invitationService > fetches received invitations from the split pending/past endpoint
invitationService > fetches one invitation detail by id
profileService.changePassword > posts the authenticated password endpoint with old and new password
profileService public profile > fetches the public profile endpoint without authentication
profileService equipment > creates an equipment item for the authenticated user
profileService equipment > updates an equipment item for the authenticated user
profileService showcase images > requests showcase upload instructions for the authenticated user
profileService showcase images > confirms a showcase image upload for the authenticated user
profileService badges > fetches the authenticated user badges endpoint
profileService badges > fetches another user badges endpoint
profileService badges > fetches the badge catalog endpoint
authErrorPresentation > translates auth error codes for banner messages
authErrorPresentation > translates backend validation details into field errors
getEventLifecyclePresentation > maps ACTIVE to UPCOMING
getEventLifecyclePresentation > maps IN_PROGRESS
getEventLifecyclePresentation > returns null for other statuses
getEventStatusPresentation > formats IN_PROGRESS into a user-facing label
getEventStatusPresentation > formats unknown uppercase enum-like values into title case
prepareAvatarBlobs > returns original and small blobs
prepareAvatarBlobs > works with png files
shouldShowApproximateLocationIndicator > 'public non-participant with exact bac…'
shouldShowApproximateLocationIndicator > 'public non-participant with unexpecte…'
shouldShowApproximateLocationIndicator > 'protected non-participant with approx…'
shouldShowApproximateLocationIndicator > 'protected approved participant with e…'
shouldShowApproximateLocationIndicator > 'protected host with exact backend loc…'
shouldShowApproximateLocationIndicator > 'private invited viewer with exact bac…'
getNotificationPresentation > returns invitation copy and routes to invitations for PRIVATE_EVENT_INVITATION_RECEIVED
getNotificationPresentation > returns approved copy and routes to event for PROTECTED_EVENT_JOIN_REQUEST_APPROVED
getNotificationPresentation > formats cooldown metadata for PROTECTED_EVENT_JOIN_REQUEST_REJECTED
getNotificationPresentation > returns accepted and declined invitation notifications as event updates
getNotificationPresentation > falls back to generic title and body for unknown notification types
getNotificationPresentation > returns NONE action target when notification has no event reference
isDedicatedParticipationNotification > returns true for participation-related types
isDedicatedParticipationNotification > returns false for unknown or null types
resolveNotificationRoute > routes invitation-received notifications to /invitations regardless of event_id
resolveNotificationRoute > routes approved/rejected join request notifications to the event detail page
resolveNotificationRoute > falls back to event_id from data when top-level event_id is missing
resolveNotificationRoute > returns null when there is nothing to navigate to
resolveNotificationRoute > honors a deep_link pointing to /events/:id when no other route is determinable
validators > accepts a valid email
validators > rejects an invalid otp
validators > rejects usernames with unsupported characters
validators > allows blank phone numbers but rejects malformed input
validators > rejects future birth dates
useLoginViewModel > localizes invalid credential errors from the backend
useRegisterViewModel > requires gender and birth date before requesting OTP
useRegisterViewModel > sends required gender and birth date when OTP verify succeeds
useFavoritesViewModel > returns favorited events
useFavoritesViewModel > returns empty list when no favorites
useFavoritesViewModel > sets error on failure
useDiscoverViewModel persistence > localizes the short label for browser-based locations
useDiscoverViewModel persistence > restores selected location and active query context from the current session
useDiscoverViewModel persistence > refetches discover results with the selected minimum age filter
useEventDetailViewModel favorites > adds favorite locally without refetching event detail
useEventDetailViewModel favorites > removes favorite locally without refetching event detail
useEventDetailViewModel favorites > rolls back the local favorite state when the request fails
useEventDetailViewModel favorites > marks the viewer as pending immediately after a successful join request
useEventDetailViewModel favorites > marks the viewer as joined immediately after a successful public join
useMyEventsViewModel > splits upcoming response into upcoming (ACTIVE) and active (IN_PROGRESS)
useMyEventsViewModel > returns empty active list when no IN_PROGRESS events
useMyEventsViewModel > defaults to active tab
useUnreadCountViewModel > applies immediate unread count updates from notification interactions
useAdminListViewModel > applies filters and advances offset pagination
NotificationsAdminPage > validates required fields without clearing typed state
NotificationsAdminPage > submits selected delivery mode and displays backend result counts
NotificationsAdminPage > loads sent notifications and filters by user
ParticipationsAdminPage > creates an approved manual participation and refreshes the table
ParticipationsAdminPage > shows create validation and backend failures without refreshing
ParticipationsAdminPage > confirms cancellation, sends the cancel action, and refreshes the table
EventDetailPage ratings > lets the host end an in-progress event from the management section
EventDetailPage ratings > links the host name block to the public profile page
EventDetailPage ratings > links approved participants to the public profile page from the management list
EventDetailPage ratings > links pending join requesters to the public profile page
EventDetailPage ratings > opens the report modal from the flag button and submits the selected reason
EventDetailPage ratings > shows report success state from the view model
EventDetailPage ratings > shows existing participant rating in summary mode until edit is requested
EventDetailPage ratings > hides the participant rating card for non-participants
EventDetailPage ratings > shows host-side participant ratings and edit actions in the management list
EventDetailPage ratings > renders the directions link with the event coordinates when location is a POINT
EventDetailPage ratings > shows approximate area copy and hides directions for approximate protected locations
EventDetailPage ratings > shows the approximate district and province when protected location address is available
EventDetailPage ratings > shows the map fallback and hides the directions link when coordinates are missing
EventDetailPage ratings > builds a Google Maps directions URL with encoded destination coordinates
EventDetailPage ratings > shows the Invite Users button on private events for the host
EventDetailPage ratings > hides the Invite Users button on public events even for the host
EventDetailPage ratings > hides the Invite Users button for non-host viewers on private events
EventDetailPage ratings > shows a pending join-request banner instead of join actions
EventDetailPage ratings > shows the proof image picker in the request form when expanded
EventDetailPage ratings > renders a View Attachment link for host pending requests with image_url
testcase.system-err:
In HTML, <a> cannot be a descendant of <a>. This will cause a hydration error.
... <Router basename={undefined} location={{pathname:"...", ...}} navigationType="POP" navigator={{index:0, ...}} ...> <Routes> <RenderedRoute match={{...}} routeContext={{outlet:null, ...}}> <EventDetailPage> <EventContent event={{id:"event-1", ...}} isAuthenticated={true} token="token" coverImageUploading={false} ...> <div className="ed-page"> <button> <div> <div> <div> <ExpiryWarningBanner> <ReconfirmationBanner> <JoinActionSection> <ParticipantRatingSection> <div className="ed-sections"> <div> <LocationSection> <div> <div> <div> <div> <EventVersionHistorySection> <div className="ed-section"> <h2> <div> <div> <div className="ed-mgmt-group"> <h3> <ul className="ed-mgmt-list"> <li className="ed-mgmt-it..."> <LinkWithRef> <LinkWithRef to="/users/req..." className="ed-mgmt-us..."> > <a > className="ed-mgmt-user-link" > href="/users/requester-1" > onClick={function handleClick} > ref={function} > target={undefined} > data-discover="true" > > <div className="ed-mgmt-us..."> <div> <span> <span> > <a > className="ed-mgmt-attachment" > href="https://sem-bucket.fra1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/events/x/join-requests/y/up..." > target="_blank" > rel="noopener noreferrer" > data-testid="ed-mgmt-attachment-jr-1" > > ... ...
<a> cannot contain a nested <a>. See this log for the ancestor stack trace.
An update to EventInteractionPanel inside a test was not wrapped in act(...).
When testing, code that causes React state updates should be wrapped into act(...):
act(() => { /* fire events that update state */ }); /* assert on the output */
This ensures that you're testing the behavior the user would see in the browser. Learn more at https://react.dev/link/wrap-tests-with-act An update to EventInteractionPanel inside a test was not wrapped in act(...).
When testing, code that causes React state updates should be wrapped into act(...):
act(() => { /* fire events that update state */ }); /* assert on the output */
This ensures that you're testing the behavior the user would see in the browser. Learn more at https://react.dev/link/wrap-tests-with-act

testcase.name: EventDetailPage ratings > does not render the attachment link when image_url is null
EventDetailPage ratings > shows a Cancel Request button only when the user has a pending request
EventDetailPage ratings > does not show a Cancel Request button for non-pending viewers
EventDetailPage ratings > does not show a Cancel Request button when attendance needs reconfirmation
EventDetailPage ratings > opens a confirmation modal and only calls handleCancelJoinRequest after confirming
EventDetailPage ratings > renders a dismissible error message when cancel fails
EventDetailPage ratings > shows the View Ticket CTA for joined participants on public events
EventDetailPage ratings > shows the View Ticket CTA for joined participants on protected events
EventDetailPage ratings > shows the View Ticket CTA for joined participants on private events
EventDetailPage ratings > hides the View Ticket CTA for non-participants
EventDetailPage ratings > hides the View Ticket CTA for completed or canceled events
MyEventsPage tabs > renders tabs in the updated order with Hosted label
InvitationsPage > shows loading state while fetching
InvitationsPage > shows empty state when there are no invitations
InvitationsPage > renders pending invitation with accept and decline actions
InvitationsPage > renders past accepted invitation without response actions
InvitationsPage > calls handleAccept when Accept is clicked
InvitationsPage > renders an error message and dismiss button
NotificationsPage invitation modal > renders accepted and declined invitation notification labels in the feed
NotificationsPage invitation modal > opens invitation details from an invitation notification and fetches by invitation id
NotificationsPage invitation modal > shows a non-actionable canceled invitation state
PublicProfilePage > renders public profile sections without private account fields
PublicProfilePage > renders a loading state while the profile is being fetched
PublicProfilePage > renders an error state and retries when requested
TicketDetailPage > renders ticket info, status, and the mobile QR hint for an active ticket
TicketDetailPage > shows the eligibility notice when the active ticket cannot issue a QR right now
TicketDetailPage > hides the mobile QR hint for non-active tickets (USED, EXPIRED, CANCELED)
TicketDetailPage > renders the not-found view when the ticket is missing or not owned by the caller
TicketDetailPage > renders an error message with retry when the request fails
TicketsPage > shows the loading state while fetching
TicketsPage > renders the empty state when there are no tickets
TicketsPage > renders an active ticket card with status badge and event info
TicketsPage > renders a USED ticket with the Used status badge
TicketsPage > renders an error message that can be dismissed
